message:
feat(export): add in_cycle and additional metric columns to SQLite export

Adds in_cycle boolean, eigenvector, hub_score, authority_score,
k_core_level, slack, and is_articulation_point columns to the
issue_metrics table, providing richer graph metric data in the
exported SQLite database for downstream consumers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
